results.rendered_html: hari—vaṃśa m. n. (scil. purāṇa) N. of a celebrated poem supplementary to the Mahā-bhārata on the history and adventures of Kṛṣṇa and his family (it is usually regarded as part of the greater epic, though really a comparatively modern addition to it; cf.  IW. 418 )

harivaṃśa m.
1〉 Hariʼs d. i. Viṣṇuʼs (Kṛṣṇaʼs) Geschlecht  WEBER, KṚṢṆAJ. 270 . 283 .  ŚATR. 10,319 .  H. 35 .
— 2〉 Titel des bekannten Anhanges zum Mahābhārata  MBH. 1,357 . 18,280 . purāṇa  HARIV. 16358. fg.   WEBER, KṚṢṆAJ. 304  (n.). ˚catuṣka  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 154,a,11 . ˚kṛṣṇalīlā  MACK. Coll. 1,60 .
— 3〉 N. pr. eines Dichters  HALL  in der Einl. zu  VĀSAVAD. 7 .  WILSON, Sel. Works 1,177 . hita˚  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 131,b, No. 239 .
